overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt path through a foggy forest at night. The scene features atmospheric low-light conditions with a cool blue-green color palette and dense vegetation lining the trail.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path, navigating through the foggy forest with swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small rocks
dense coniferous trees lining both sides of the path
lush green grass and low vegetation on the forest floor
thick mist hanging between the trees creating atmospheric depth

segments.scene_description: Geralt traverses a foggy forest path at night, with tall pine trees flanking the winding dirt trail. The cool blue-green lighting creates a moody atmosphere as mist hangs in the distance, while the character walks steadily through the dense woodland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, nocturnal woodland as a character navigates a winding trail. It begins with Geralt traversing a dirt path flanked by towering pine trees, where a cool blue-green palette defines the atmosphere. As he walks steadily forward, the camera tracks his progress through the dense vegetation, emphasizing the depth of the forest. The scene then pushes further into the woodland, where thick mist hangs heavily in the distance to obscure the horizon.
